messages.content: Send an email to alice@example.com with subject 'Project Update' summarising that the backend migration is 80% complete and on track for Friday delivery.

arguments.subject: Project Update
arguments.body:
Hi Alice,

I wanted to give you a quick update on the backend migration.

We are currently 80% complete and everything remains on track for delivery this Friday as planned.

Please let me know if you need any additional details.

Best regards

content.delta:
The email has been sent successfully to **alice@example.com** with the subject **"Project Update"**. 

The message summarized that the backend migration is **80% complete** and **on track for Friday delivery**, including a brief professional overview and an offer to provide additional details if needed.
